primary_text: Tell WeBot the date, budget, vibe, and constraints. Get a reviewed plan for the trip, date night, or road trip.
headline: Plans Done For You
creative_brief: Mobile-first image: calendar, route line, checklist, and warm workspace feel. No fake chatbot screenshots.
notes: Best consumer-friendly starter. Cap budget until purchase data exists.

primary_text: Upload messy PDFs, invoices, screenshots, or links. WeBot turns them into clean notes, tables, and next steps.
headline: Fix Messy Files
creative_brief: Before/after visual: messy stack on left, clean table/checklist on right. Keep readable at mobile size.
notes: Good broad pain point. Do not imply legal/financial advice.

primary_text: Need a card, post, business card, or simple logo direction? WeBot drafts it and reviews it before delivery.
headline: Creative Help Fast
creative_brief: Collage of thank-you card, social caption, business-card layout, and color swatches. Keep brand polished, not cute.

primary_text: Comparing vendors, tools, or options? WeBot makes the brief: sources, tradeoffs, risks, and a clear next step.
headline: Decision Briefs
creative_brief: Simple visual: three options, checkmarks, source notes, final recommendation. Avoid exaggerated claims.
notes: Better for business owners and operators than casual audiences.

primary_text: Keep sending the little tasks that block your week. WeBot routes, drafts, reviews, and delivers through Studio.
headline: AI Agent Work Desk
creative_brief: Dashboard crop with clear stages: intake, route, draft, review, approval, complete.
notes: Use after one-time job winners prove demand.
